# PERF-137 positive: runtime.Caller in a hot path
lang: go
file: PERF-137-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"runtime"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_, file, line, ok := runtime.Caller(0)
	if ok {
		w.Header().Set("X-Source", file+":"+itoa(line))
	}
	_ = r
}

func itoa(n int) string {
	if n == 0 {
		return "0"
	}
	neg := n < 0
	if neg {
		n = -n
	}
	buf := make([]byte, 0, 20)
	for n > 0 {
		buf = append(buf, byte('0'+n%10))
		n /= 10
	}
	if neg {
		buf = append(buf, '-')
	}
	for i, j := 0, len(buf)-1; i < j; i, j = i+1, j-1 {
		buf[i], buf[j] = buf[j], buf[i]
	}
	return string(buf)
}
